OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

TWEETFEED_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: Confidence of the ingested data from 0-100.

TWEETFEED_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: True or False, enable the creation of indicators.

TWEETFEED_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: True or False, enable the creation of observables.

TWEETFEED_INTERVAL.description: In day when the connector will run.

TWEETFEED_ORG_DESCRIPTION.description: Organization description, which will be referred to data injected.

TWEETFEED_ORG_NAME.description: Organization name, which will be referred to data injected.

TWEETFEED_DAYS_BACK_IN_TIME.description: Number of days to retrieve data back in time.
